7-10 Year Warranty

Warranty & Protection

Shop with confidence. Every Morzze bathroom and kitchen product is backed by our industry-leading warranty program.

How Warranty Works

Simple steps to protect your bathroom and kitchen investment

Purchase

Buy your Morzze bathroom or kitchen products from authorized dealers

Register

Register your product within 30 days of purchase

Protected

Enjoy 7-10 years of comprehensive warranty coverage

Support

Contact us anytime for warranty claims or service

Warranty Services

Register your product, file a claim, or check warranty status.

Found on the product box or warranty card
